allow: Bash(./gradlew :web-ide:backend:test --tests "com.forge.webide.controller.McpControllerTest.GET tools returns list of available tools" --info)

  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "x-api-key: sk-cp-T3dioO8RnOVtwisOv4-B86huzp-6D1H8unh0tYckKepAhliNEDqsZ1KHKqYI6D24BppXNapNO38u6_sOn_fZpDtQjQ_qnsaemqyUyiOntGMikhWus68y704" \\
  -H "anthropic-version: 2023-06-01" \\
  -d '{
    "model": "MiniMax-M2.5",
    "max_tokens": 256,
    "temperature": 0.0,
    "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Judge semantic similarity. Return ONLY valid JSON, no other text.\\n\\nExpected meaning: 需要从白班或其他工区借调有发泡操作资质的人员到夜班，同时确保安全合规\\n\\nActual output: 从白班板材区借调张伟、李明到夜班FOAM_A/FOAM_B，从总装区夜班调赵磊到FOAM_C，所有人员持有发泡操作安全资质证书，连续工时未超过12小时\\n\\nReturn JSON: {\\"similar\\": true or false, \\"score\\": 0.0 to 1.0, \\"rationale\\": \\"one sentence reason\\"}\\nRules: score >= 0.7 means similar. Compare core meaning, not exact wording."}]
  }' 2>&1)
